nilearn import failures
dataset download issues)

expected inputs/outputs
failure modes
and environment setup for reproducible runs

optional tracing
per-tool latency and error metrics) for MCP operations

enforce pre-commit/lint/type checks on generated MCP code to match repo quality standards

datasets
maskers
GLM) to reduce maintenance risk
add golden tests for serialized outputs where deterministic (JSON schema snapshots)
define deprecation policy and changelog section for MCP API evolution

success_factors: End-to-end workflow status is success with all expected nodes executed (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
MCP plugin started and passed health checks over stdio transport.
Low intrusiveness risk and import-mode adapter reduced integration friction.
Repository has clear Python packaging via pyproject.toml, enabling baseline dependency discovery.
failure_reasons: DeepWiki analysis failed, reducing semantic discovery depth.
Original project test result is marked failed/empty despite reported 100% coverage, indicating test telemetry inconsistency.
Generated service appears minimal/generic (single 'main' endpoint) with low functional coverage of Nilearn capabilities.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully; exact per-node duration not provided. Repository ingestion used zip fallback over ~547 files, which likely increased I/O/parsing time.
node_performance.analysis_time: Completed with moderate confidence (import feasibility 0.5). Static/semantic analysis quality limited by fallback discovery and DeepWiki failure.
node_performance.generation_time: Completed and produced 7 files, but output metrics report 0 LOC/0 size, suggesting instrumentation gaps rather than true zero output.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin test passed (healthy startup). Original project tests not meaningfully executed/recorded; test timing metrics are zero.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Unknown due to missing telemetry (reported as 0 MB). Cannot validate memory behavior under realistic Nilearn workloads.
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Unknown due to missing telemetry (reported as 0%). CPU-bound paths (GLM/decoding/maskers) remain unprofiled.
resource_usage.disk_usage: Repository is large and data-heavy; zip fallback and dataset operations may increase disk pressure. Generated artifact size metric is unreliable (0).
